# The Aligned Edit — Veronica Dietz

> A diagnostic podcast for identity-led founders. Each episode examines the structural decisions, identity patterns, and strategic assumptions that shape whether a business moves or stalls. Not tactics. Not motivation. The kind of thinking that changes what you decide next.

Hosted by Veronica Dietz, founder of VD Advisory Group and Tyche Digital Agency.

## About the Show

The Aligned Edit is for founders and operators who have stopped trusting standard advice and started asking better questions. Veronica uses a diagnostic lens — locating the load-bearing issue underneath what looks like a marketing, messaging, or momentum problem.

## Listen

- Podcast page: https://listen.veronicadietz.com/
